'''mayufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalitogenicity|encephalitogenicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalitogenicity|encephalitogenicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mayufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyifith|mæyifith]] || [[word:mæyifij|mæyifij]] || [[word:mæyifish|mæyifish]] || [[word:mæyifi|mæyifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayuyufuth|mayuyufuth]] || [[word:mayuyufuj|mayuyufuj]] || [[word:mayuyufush|mayuyufush]] || [[word:mayuyufu|mayuyufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayufuth|mayufuth]] || [[word:mayufuj|mayufuj]] || [[word:mayufush|mayufush]] || [[word:mayufu|mayufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayuffuth|mayuffuth]] || [[word:mayuffuj|mayuffuj]] || [[word:mayuffush|mayuffush]] || [[word:mayuffuf|mayuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayufuthu|mayufuthu]] || [[word:mayufuju|mayufuju]] || [[word:mayufushu|mayufushu]] || [[word:mayufuku|mayufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayufuth|mayufuth]] || [[word:mayufuj|mayufuj]] || [[word:mayufush|mayufush]] || [[word:mayufu|mayufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayufuthul|mayufuthul]] || [[word:mayufujul|mayufujul]] || [[word:mayufushul|mayufushul]] || [[word:mayufukul|mayufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayufuthuthu|mayufuthuthu]] || [[word:mayufujuju|mayufujuju]] || [[word:mayufushushu|mayufushushu]] || [[word:mayufuku|mayufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayufuthun|mayufuthun]] || [[word:mayufujun|mayufujun]] || [[word:mayufushun|mayufushun]] || [[word:mayufukun|mayufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayufuthuoro|mayufuthuoro]] || [[word:mayufujuoro|mayufujuoro]] || [[word:mayufushuoro|mayufushuoro]] || [[word:mayufukuoro|mayufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
